x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Omnichannel routing ensures Now Assist AI can engage customers across all channels (chat, email, portal).
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure omnichannel routing in the CSM Workspace. Enable chat, email, and portal channels. Now Assist CSM AI capabilities extend across all configured omnichannel touchpoints.
